title: Current DWP research being undertaken by external organisations
body: "If you have been contacted to take part in research by an external  research organisation on behalf of DWP, check this list to verify that the contact is genuine.  Check that the fieldwork dates, title and description match the information you received when you were approached.  List of current fieldwork     Fieldwork dates Title Description     January 2026 to February 2026 Ipsos – Experiences and circumstances of Move to Universal Credit customers who were not expected to work when claiming Universal Credit You may be contacted to take part in research. The aim is to learn more about the experience and circumstances of participants who were not expected to work when moving to Universal Credit from legacy benefits. And, if at all, any changes in participants’ circumstances since claiming Universal Credit.   January 2026 to February 2026  NatCen – PIP Award Reviews Survey You may be contacted by phone, email or letter to take part in a survey. The aim is to understand Personal Independence Payment (PIP) customers’ experiences and expectations of the Award Review process.   January 2026 to February 2026  NatCen – Work Aspirations focus on young people You may be contacted to take part in research. The aim is to understand the aspirations, barriers and support needs of participants.   January 2026 to March 2026 Verian – Pension Credit Mailshot You may be contacted to take part in research.   December 2025 to March 2026 YouGov – Lived Experiences of Adequacy in Retirement You may be contacted to take part in research. The aim is to learn more about participants’ retirement and what an adequate retirement means to them.   December 2025 to March 2026 IFF – Pension Decumulation and Decision Making You may be contacted to take part in research. The aim is to understand how participants make decisions when accessing their defined contribution pension.   December 2025  NatCen (and Criteria) – PIP Application: Behavioural Insights Study You may be contacted to take part in research. The aim is to explore how people decide to do an application for Personal Independence Payment (PIP). You do not need to be familiar with PIP to take part.   November 2025 to February 2026 IPSOS UC Childcare Survey You may be contacted to take part in this research. It is a survey of 10,000 Universal Credit parents. The aim is to understand the reasons behind childcare and employment decisions, alongside their use of childcare offers across government.   October 2025 to September 2026  NatCen – English Longitudinal Study of Ageing (ELSA) You may be contacted to take part in research. The aim is to understand different circumstances in the English population aged 50 and older.   April 2025 to January 2026 Institute for Employment Studies & National Learning and Work Institute, Jobs Plus Evaluation Pilot You may be contacted to take part in research. The aim is to understand participants’ experience of Jobs Plus employment support.   April 2025 to September 2025 IFF Research – Additional Work Coach Support You may be contacted to take part in this research. The aim...

taxons.title: Research and innovation in health and social care
